name: Class Of ‘09 | RPG - All Characters - Trey Pack | "Make No Mistakes."
description:
It’s a rejection sim. At least, it was before it became a fetish game. Dive into the years 2006-2009 of Burke, Virginia, Lake Braddock Secondary School, and experience the overly complex and dramatic life of a high school student, accompanied with a twisted and manipulative environment. Yeah, I don’t know what else to say. For anyone who has the NERVE to say this bot is ass, then it probably is. There's around 16 character bios in this shit, and JLLM for some reason loves making stuff violent the moment I add the word "rude" in a personality. It goes from Lawful Good to Chaotic Evil. I tried, basically. I managed to get ZZZ down, so this should go smoothly.

I'd suggest using Pawan.Krd. I use it and it's really fucking simple to set up. From what I get, it doesn't make characters aggressive the very fucking moment you put "rude" into it, and they don't stutter like they're in the TItanic's waters the moment you put "introvert." I like it.
